name: Chocolate Almond Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the finely-crushed chocolate wafer crumbs into the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan.
2. Set the pan aside.
3. In a food processor, process cream cheese and the next seven ingredients until smooth.
4. Add egg and process just until blended.
5. Fold in chocolate morsels.
6. Slowly pour the mixture over the crumbs in the pan.
7. Bake at 300 degrees F. for 65 to 70 minutes or until the cheesecake is set.
8. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
10. Remove the sides of the pan, transfer the cheesecake to a serving platter.
11. Garnish with chocolate leaves, if desired. (Melt chocolate in a double boiler or microwave. Using a non-poisonous leaf, brush on melted chocolate; place in freezer for 2-3 hours until hardened. Peel leaf from the chocolate to garnish.)
